title: Partner Launch Delay
scenario: A partner-facing release slipped because field teams were not briefed on last-minute dependency changes.
lesson: Pair every launch checklist with a field enablement review 24 hours before release.

title: Migration Dry Run Saves Rollout
scenario: A dry-run import revealed hidden null handling issues before customer data was touched.
lesson: Force a sampled reconciliation pass before any data migration is approved.

title: Ops Escalation Loop
scenario: An operations team reduced incident response time by naming a single owner per lane.
lesson: Parallel work still needs singular accountability per stream.

title: Executive Review Sprint
scenario: A compressed planning cycle worked once checkpoints were tightened and decisions were logged visibly.
lesson: Short timelines only work when decision checkpoints are explicit and non-negotiable.
